parameters.returnFields: id, client_final_id, montant_ht, montant_ttc, type, mois, created_at

parameters.text: {{ 'Revenu: ' + $input.all()[3].json.montant_ht + '€ HT (' + $input.all()[3].json.type + ') — Client: ' + $input.all()[4].json[0].client_name + '\n' + ($input.all()[5].json.commissions.length > 0 ? $input.all()[5].json.commissions.map(c => ('Commission N' + c.niveau + ': ' + c.amount + '€ pour ' + c.partner_name)).join('\n') : '') }}
